commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=68c015051344b9c5f73fb1442649fca8d90cfd92)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds runtime trajectory lifecycle recording and focused lifecycle tests for the CLI executor path in `src/agents/cli-runner/execute.ts`.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's CLI executor has no trajectory recorder while the docs and embedded runner establish lifecycle trajectory events. I did not run a live `claude-cli` session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-owned real behavior proof and a small event-ordering fix before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: fix(cli-runner): emit trajectory events from CLI executor path
target.author: 0xghost42
